title: Nut-beetle
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''nut-beetle''' was a small [[Insect/Legends|insect]] often eaten as a snack. Its shiny outer shell could be split to reach the soft, juicy meat inside. Nut-beetles were eaten alive, with the inedible portions usually spat out into a wastebasket.

Imperial Supervisor [[Gurdun]] was known to enjoy nut-beetles.

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=Therefore I Am: The Tale of IG-88|book=Tales of the Bounty Hunters}} {{1st}}
